# robots.txt that blocks common AI crawlers but allows normal search engines

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/

Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap.xml
